title: Ras Al Khaimah Heat Wave
lead: Ras Al Khaimah is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.86. Temperatures are extremely high, reaching a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Ras Al Khaimah is causing extremely hot conditions, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 12.5 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 25%, which is relatively low, and the wind speed is at 9.7 km/h. 
 The Heat Wave is expected to continue, with no Heating Degree Days (HDD) recorded, indicating no relief from the heat.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat mitigation measures to ensure public safety.
